Prevents further attacks RoseClear 3 in 1 Action protects against further infestations, including new growths Next page 1 3 In 1 Action 2 Kills Aphids 3 For Organic Use 4 Prevents Further Attacks Guard your roses from pests and diseases RoseClear 3 in 1 Action is ideal for roses and other ornamental plants. Its unique characteristics kill aphids (greenfly and blackfly) larvae and adults, in addition to controlling fungus, and protects against further infestations – including new growth. Certified for use in organic systems and plants can be treated up to six times a year to achieve maximum effect. The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic and is fully recyclable. Why should I use RoseClear 3 in 1 Action? Kills larvae and adult aphids (greenfly and blackfly), spider mites and whiteflies. Fights existing infections of blackspot (useful reduction) and powdery mildew. Protects plants against further disease infections. Certified for organic use. Where can I use RoseClear 3 in 1 Action? Ideal for roses as well as on other flowering and ornamental plants. It is always advisable to test a small area of the plant, by treating it and leaving for a few days, before treating the entire plant collection. When should I use RoseClear 3 in 1 Action? April to the end of September. Apply RoseClear 3 in 1 Action at the first signs of disease and/or insect attack, and repeat every 7-10 days. Maximum of 6 treatments per year. Spray in calm conditions, avoiding bright sunlight, droughts and frosts. How do I use RoseClear 3 in 1 Action? Shake well before use. Choose a calm day, avoid bright sunlight, drought and frost. Spray early morning or evening to minimise risk to bees. Spray plants thoroughly to wet upper and lower surfaces of leaves. Avoid contact with non-target plants.
